body.title: PE chain temperature: 0.2 for HYPOTHESIZE/REPLAN, 0.7 for PLAN/SITUATE
body.result: CC implemented temperature split: HYPOTHESIZE/REPLAN=0.2, PLAN/SITUATE=0.7; also stripped think/function_calls blocks in _parse_hypothesis
body.description: All _call_tier2* calls in pe_chain.py currently use model default temperature. Split by phase: HYPOTHESIZE + REPLAN = 0.2 (deterministic code edits, less random = fewer hallucinations). PLAN + SITUATE = 0.7 (creative file search and design reasoning). Pass temperature param through _call_tier2() and _call_cloud_programming(). File: wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py (LOW inertia).
